message:
fix(lab/oracle): allow CancelRequested tasks to complete without entering Cancelling phase

The CancellationProtocolOracle previously rejected any state
transition from CancelRequested directly to CompletedOk,
CompletedErr, or CompletedPanicked, requiring tasks to first
move through the Cancelling state.  This was overly strict:
a task that has been cancel-requested but has not yet observed
the cancellation signal is free to complete its work normally.

The fix adds CompletedOk, CompletedErr, and CompletedPanicked
as valid successors of CancelRequested in the state machine's
transition table.

New test cancel_requested_then_completed_ok_passes (with
variants for CompletedErr and CompletedPanicked) verifies the
relaxed transitions pass oracle validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
